title: Analyze Project
description: Analyze a project using Claude AI and output structured feedback.

maxFiles.description: Maximum number of source files to include from the project.

includeDeps.description: Include source files from internal project dependencies.

focus.description: Subset of analysis categories. Omit to include all categories.

model.description: Claude model identifier to use for the analysis.

format.description: Output format. `full` prints the complete analysis; `summary` prints only the executive summary.

outputFile.description: Write the full markdown analysis report to this file path (relative to the workspace root). Always writes the full report regardless of `format`.
